nasb.text: For wicked men are found among My people, They watch like fowlers lying in wait; They set a trap, They catch men.

esv.text: For wicked men are found among my people; they lurk like fowlers lying in wait. They set a trap; they catch men.

cnv.text: 在我的子民中發現了惡人， 他們好像捕鳥的人蹲伏窺探， 裝置網羅捕捉人。

ccb.text: 我的子民中有恶人， 他们像捕鸟人一样埋伏等候， 设下网罗陷害人。
